messages.content: Hello! How can I assist you today?
Generate an image of a cat

I've generated an image for you:

![Generated Image](https://oaidalleapiprodscus.blob.core.windows.net/private/org-Yh76Y43H54S7cSzY2d7PJb2a/user-694Lha43voRkn4gGxaZbYrMv/img-yc2TgTFzSQdAxK2mVbbzjh2w.png?st=2025-07-15T17%3A49%3A34Z&se=2025-07-15T19%3A49%3A34Z&sp=r&sv=2024-08-04&sr=b&rscd=inline&rsct=image/png&skoid=475fd488-6c59-44a5-9aa9-31c4db451bea&sktid=a48cca56-e6da-484e-a814-9c849652bcb3&skt=2025-07-15T10%3A23%3A48Z&ske=2025-07-16T10%3A23%3A48Z&sks=b&skv=2024-08-04&sig=an4Kd%2BoUiU3IivGFXtkUinv47QcBqPhdeKcl82Hcg7g%3D)
Make it realistic and make it a tabby.

I've generated an image for you:

![Generated Image](https://oaidalleapiprodscus.blob.core.windows.net/private/org-Yh76Y43H54S7cSzY2d7PJb2a/user-694Lha43voRkn4gGxaZbYrMv/img-EHZaa57g5KixIkhv57zf51ZU.png?st=2025-07-15T17%3A50%3A10Z&se=2025-07-15T19%3A50%3A10Z&sp=r&sv=2024-08-04&sr=b&rscd=inline&rsct=image/png&skoid=475fd488-6c59-44a5-9aa9-31c4db451bea&sktid=a48cca56-e6da-484e-a814-9c849652bcb3&skt=2025-07-15T06%3A52%3A10Z&ske=2025-07-16T06%3A52%3A10Z&sks=b&skv=2024-08-04&sig=7qNzEvhnvT9eATNCSbTYpPPfvWSorrcyBuBcXz0P9J0%3D)
Now make it an oil painting

I've generated an image for you:

![Generated Image](https://oaidalleapiprodscus.blob.core.windows.net/private/org-Yh76Y43H54S7cSzY2d7PJb2a/user-694Lha43voRkn4gGxaZbYrMv/img-i7SGAaKtwu0J4F8uZTGeglj4.png?st=2025-07-15T17%3A53%3A13Z&se=2025-07-15T19%3A53%3A13Z&sp=r&sv=2024-08-04&sr=b&rscd=inline&rsct=image/png&skoid=475fd488-6c59-44a5-9aa9-31c4db451bea&sktid=a48cca56-e6da-484e-a814-9c849652bcb3&skt=2025-07-15T11%3A00%3A49Z&ske=2025-07-16T11%3A00%3A49Z&sks=b&skv=2024-08-04&sig=i9RGJblGUF9Z3g88SOIRZ4DvzfjRxZa6PSk8BnzkKYE%3D)
No, I meant make the cat picture an oil painting.

I've generated an image for you:

![Generated Image](https://oaidalleapiprodscus.blob.core.windows.net/private/org-Yh76Y43H54S7cSzY2d7PJb2a/user-694Lha43voRkn4gGxaZbYrMv/img-7e3L35l7kOnBqG0pqzeX6G7U.png?st=2025-07-15T17%3A53%3A55Z&se=2025-07-15T19%3A53%3A55Z&sp=r&sv=2024-08-04&sr=b&rscd=inline&rsct=image/png&skoid=475fd488-6c59-44a5-9aa9-31c4db451bea&sktid=a48cca56-e6da-484e-a814-9c849652bcb3&skt=2025-07-15T14%3A45%3A42Z&ske=2025-07-16T14%3A45%3A42Z&sks=b&skv=2024-08-04&sig=GHYjIxxk5cVlSblHLr%2Buwfn3slmwTYcSzPb1id52UPs%3D)
